creator: w-info@xs4all.nl
text:
cdrecord -scanbus for example gives:

Cdrecord-ProDVD-ProBD-Clone 3.00 (i386-unknown-freebsd9.0) Copyright (C) 1995-2010 J�rg Schilling
cdrecord: Inappropriate ioctl for device. CAMIOCOMMAND ioctl failed. Cannot open or use SCSI driver.
cdrecord: For possible targets try 'cdrecord -scanbus'.
cdrecord: For possible transport specifiers try 'cdrecord dev=help'.

I installed the package, but seems not updated as when I compiled it myself from the ports, it works.

Fix: 

Compile from ports, so the cdrtools package should just be replaced.
How-To-Repeat: Run cdrecord.
